feed.subtitle: Latest gigs and events in Oslo, Norway
feed.title: Oslo Gig Guide

entry.content:
Venue: Revolver
Start: 2026-04-05 21:00
Tags: goth


DJ MS.ANDRIST OG DJ DRACULIE SKAL GI DERE LITT PÅSKEGOTH DENNE KVELDEN!

entry.title: PÅSKEGOTH MED DJ MS.ANDRIST OG DJ DRACULIE (2026-04-05)

entry.content:
Venue: Mir
Start: 2026-04-08 18:00
Tags: Bingo, Dragshow, Musikk


MIR åpner tidliere denne kvelden for å gjøre plass for en ny runde med Drag-musikk-BONGO!!!

Elita Pike, Vilya Dumi, Hey Pistol, Belle Bottoms og Laryn-Gitis inviterer til Decades Dragbingo! Bli med oss på en reise gjennom ti-årenes musikksmak! ❤️

 VELKOMMEN!!!

🎶🐣🎶🦄🎶🪩🎶


Tickets:
entry.title: DRAG-BINGO @MIR (2026-04-08)

entry.content:
Venue: Mir
Start: 2026-04-08 18:00
Tags: Folkrock, Lyttefest, Releasefeiring


Lyttefest for albumet «Dreng» på MIR fra kl 21.30.

Vårt andre album kommer 10. april! Derfor vil vi invitere til sniklytt og litt babling om musikken❤️ Det har vært en lang og spennende prosess (3 årig) og nå skal vi feire at den nærmer seg slutt! Håper vi sees der🎉

Arrangementet er åpent og gratis

Lyttefesten starter kl 21:30

MIR åpner kl 18.00 (Drag-Bingo 18.30-21.00)


Tickets:
entry.summary: Lyttefest for albumet «Dreng» på MIR at Mir on 2026-04-08 18:00
entry.title: Lyttefest for albumet «Dreng» på MIR (2026-04-08)

entry.content:
Venue: Revolver
Start: 2026-07-01 18:00
Tags: psych, garage, groove


ORB are a heavy-psych power-trio from Geelong, Australia, blending doom-laden riffs, fuzzed-out proto-metal and cosmic groove. Featuring members Zak Olsen, Daff Gravolin and John Zacharias, the band grew from informal jams into one of Australia’s most distinctive underground psychedelic rock acts.

They debuted with the Womb cassette (2015) before breaking through with Birth (2016) and Naturality (2017), records that showcased their signature mix of Sabbath-weight, psychedelic sprawl and off-kilter melody. After a quiet spell, ORB returned with Tailem Bend (2024), expanding their palette into sun-baked psych-pop and funk-leaning rhythms. 2025 saw the band self-release their first single with new drummer John Zacharius. "Mind Over Matter / End Times" is a catchy number which finds the band leaning into their early 60s rhythm & blues influences. With the single debuting on Seattle's KEXP radio, the band was then invited on to play a live set to kick off their 2025 US tour.

Live, ORB operate as a raw, improvisational power-trio — loud, hypnotic and heavy without pretension. With one foot in classic hard-rock and another in the outer reaches of psych experimentation, ORB continue to evolve while staying unmistakably themselves.


Tickets: revolveroslo.ticketco.events
entry.title: O.R.B (aus) // Bakgården (2026-07-01)
